Working hard for
Glasgow West

News & Media

Patricia Ferguson MP

Proud to serve Glasgow West

It is a great honour to be elected as the first MP for the Glasgow West constituency. Since that time I have been working hard meeting local groups, organisations & individuals; and representing the interests of my constituents in Parliament.

You can find out all about my constituency work, surgery times and more here on my website.

Surgeries

Surgeries are regularly held throughout the Glasgow West region. To book an appointment email me at patricia.ferguson.mp@parliament.uk or call my team on 0141 370 2324.

Knightswood
1st Friday of each month at 4pm

Partick
2nd Friday of each month at 10am

Anniesland
1st Saturday of each month at 10am

Drumchapel
3rd Friday of each month at 10am

Whiteinch
4th Friday of each month at 3:30pm

Get In Touch

As your local MP, I can help you with a wide range of issues. Please use the form to contact my office.

Patricia
Ferguson MP for Glasgow West

0141 370 2324 patricia.ferguson.mp@parliament.uk

Serving the communities of Anniesland, Blairdardie, Broomhill, Claythorn, Dowanhill, Drumchapel, High Knightswood, Hyndland, Jordanhill, Knightswood, Old Drumchapel, Partick, Scotstoun, Scotstounhill, Temple, Thornwood, Whiteinch & Yoker
